arts.ttl: Analysis: Van Dijk and Konate partnership a perfect match for Liverpool
arts.sum: One of only four outfield players to play every minute of the Premier League season so far, 33-year-old Van Dijk’s value to Liverpool is as important right now as it ever has been. In open play he makes more long passes to Salah than any other Premier League outfield player produces to a team-mate.

arts.ttl: Wolves XI vs Liverpool – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Wolves make the trip to Liverpool this afternoon looking to build on recent momentum. Vitor Pereira’s side have secured back-to-back wins against Aston Villa and Blackburn Rovers to lift the mood at Molineux. arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool host Wolves in the Premier League today looking to reestablish their seven-point lead in the title race. Arsenal’s win at Leicester has narrowed the gap to four points ahead of Wolves’ arrival at Anfield. Arne Slot’s side suffered a setback in midweek after conceding a last-gasp equaliser in the Merseyside Derby.
